name: Harvest
api_notes: The V2 API covers a wide range of core objects including clients, projects, tasks, timesheets, expenses, invoices, estimates, roles, users, and reports.
one_liner: Harvest is a web-based time tracking and billing platform.
mcp_notes: There is no evidence of an official or well-known community Model Context Protocol server for Harvest.

evidence.claim: The Harvest API V2 supports both Personal Access Tokens and OAuth2 for authentication.
Every Harvest API request requires two headers: Authorization (Bearer token) and Harvest-Account-Id.
The Harvest V2 API provides comprehensive endpoints for clients, projects, timesheets, and reports.
Search citation: Harvest Reviews | Read Customer Service Reviews of www.getharvest.com

auth_notes: Authentication requires a Bearer token (via Personal Access Token or OAuth2) plus a mandatory 'Harvest-Account-Id' header for every request.
access_notes: Developers can generate a Personal Access Token (PAT) for themselves by creating a Harvest account and navigating to the Developers section within their account settings, requiring no prior approval or paid plan.
